title: Archaeology and Dating
summary: Learn how archaeologists recover, date, and interpret material evidence, from stratigraphy and radiocarbon analysis to LiDAR and ancient DNA.
learningObjectives: Explain how excavation context and stratigraphy structure archaeological reasoning
Compare major dating methods and their limits
Describe how remote sensing and ancient DNA have changed interpretations of the human past
masteryCriteria: Pass the archaeology core test at 80 percent or above
Finish the archaeological site brief project
